Headline: #56 Milwaukee Temporary Northbound Reroute near Milwaukee/Oakley
ShortDescription: Northbound 56 Milwaukee buses are temporarily rerouted via Milwaukee, Damen, Armitage and Milwaukee: due to, street blockage near Milwaukee/Oakley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Northbound #56 Milwaukee buses are temporarily rerouted via Milwaukee, Damen, Armitage, Milwaukee and over regular route, due to street blockage near Milwaukee/Oakley.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: O'Hare-bound Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier police activity near Harlem (O'Hare). Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier police activity near Harlem (O'Hare).

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
